title: The Devil and the Ten Commandments
writer: David Alexander, Michel Audiard, René Barjavel
actors: Françoise Arnoul, Charles Aznavour, Jean-Claude Brialy
plot: 1) Jerôme Chambard, a retired man, taken in by nuns in a convent, swears like a trooper. 2) Françoise takes a lover because he has promised her a diamond necklace. 3) Denis, a seminarist, decides to renounce his vows to avenge his...
